site.name: Agent Runtime
site.description: Interactive single-page walkthrough of a tool-using agent runtime across Hermes Agent and OpenClaw.

agentMode.purpose: Expose canonical, structured context for AI agents so they do not have to infer meaning from decorative HTML.
principles: Canonical product context lives on this site's Agent Mode surfaces.
Prefer /agent.json and /llms.txt over scraping decorative UI HTML.
Use agent-runtime-map.json for the structured five-part loop export.
